description: Entries the agent found but could not fully verify due to 403 errors or missing PDF links. The user reviews this file and provides corrections, then the agent applies them.
workflow: 1. Agent finds a candidate entry but gets 403 or can't find the PDF. 2. Agent adds it here instead of rules.json. 3. User reviews and provides the correct PDF URL (or says 'remove'). 4. Next agent run reads user corrections and applies them to rules.json.

processed.notes: Entry for Judge James A. Soto (D. Ariz.) AI standing order already exists in rules.json as us-fed-azd-soto-2023-08. Agent verification 2026-04-20 confirmed order entered August 4, 2023 requiring separate Notice of Use of AI with verification via traditional methods (disclosure_with_traditional_verification category).
